creator: andrej.zverev@gmail.com
text:
Hello, sorry for a long delay.

I tested your example and can't reproduce same crash. Maybe you have =
something specific with server code part? At least you can try to build =
module with debug info and provide .core file which can contain reason =
of such fail.

# perl a.pl

Received reply 0: [World]
